expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: single embedding component planning covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, and regression-sensitive integration states
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the required Phase 4a plan artifacts are missing and therefore coverage of the case focus cannot be verified: "Not demonstrable from provided evidence (blocked)." and "Without those artifacts, we cannot verify... that the plan content explicitly covers the benchmark focus: panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, regression-sensitive integration states."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The result is framed as a Phase 4a contract check and consistently references Phase 4a requirements and artifacts: title "Phase 4a Advisory Contract Check", "Primary phase under test: phase4a", and it cites Phase 4a contract expectations (e.g., "subcategory-only QA draft" and required Phase 4a files like "phase4a_spawn_manifest.json" and "drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r1.md").
